summary: Group Deal Canonical Full-Page Checkout v295 testing complete. All features verified: (1) Deal detail 'Join Deal' button redirects to /group-deals/checkout?campaign_id=X (NO popup/modal). (2) Checkout Step 1 has full name, phone, email, quantity +/- buttons, 'Continue to Payment' button. (3) Step 2 shows bank details block with CRDB BANK, KONEKT LIMITED, 015C8841347002, CORUTZTZ, HOLLAND HOUSE - identical to normal checkout. (4) Payment reference shows GDC-XXXX format. (5) Step 3 shows 'Payment Submitted', commitment ref, amount, 'Under Review' status, share CTAs (WhatsApp + Copy Link), Track Status and Browse More Deals links. (6) Admin pending payments section shows submitted payments with Approve buttons. (7) Mobile sticky CTA also redirects to checkout (not popup).
seed_data_creation: Used existing TEST_ prefixed campaigns from iteration 294
context_for_next_testing_agent: Group Deal Canonical Full-Page Checkout v295 verified. Key changes from v294: (1) Replaced popup/modal join flow with full-page checkout at /group-deals/checkout?campaign_id=X. (2) GroupDealCheckoutPage has 3-step flow: Details → Payment & Proof → Confirmation. (3) Step 1 collects customer details (name, phone, email, quantity with +/- buttons). (4) Step 2 shows bank details block (fetched from /api/public/payment-info) with CRDB BANK, KONEKT LIMITED, 015C8841347002, CORUTZTZ, HOLLAND HOUSE. (5) Payment reference shows commitment ref (GDC-XXXX). (6) Payment proof form has payer name, amount, bank reference, payment method, date. (7) Step 3 shows confirmation with 'Payment Submitted', commitment ref, amount, 'Under Review' status. (8) Share CTAs: WhatsApp + Copy Link. (9) Track Status and Browse More Deals links. (10) Mobile sticky CTA also redirects to checkout (not popup). (11) Admin pending payments section shows submitted payments with Approve buttons. (12) No popup/modal exists anywhere in the join flow.

details: Deal Summary sidebar shows product info, quantity, price, total
Bank details block present with correct info
Amount to transfer shows correct total
Copy buttons for reference and amount
Payment proof form with payer name, amount, bank reference, payment method, date
'Invite friends to unlock faster' CTA present
'Join Deal' button redirects to checkout (not popup)
Pending payments section visible in admin
Shows customer name, phone, campaign, units, amount, bank reference
Approve button present for each pending payment
No popup/modal appears when clicking 'Join Deal'
Same format and styling as normal checkout
All bank details match: CRDB BANK, KONEKT LIMITED, 015C8841347002, CORUTZTZ, HOLLAND HOUSE
